items.title: Follow up with Sai at Discern Security on catch-up call request
items.context: Email from fan@fin.capital to sai@discernsecurity.com on May 18: 'If you are open to a quick catch-up call, I would love to learn more about the latest developments and discuss how we might be able to support you.' No reply observed yet.

items.title: Prep for in-person meeting with Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) on May 26
items.context: Calendar event 'In-Person Meeting + Zoom | Simone Garreau (Prism Layer) + Fin Capital' on May 26 at Fin Capital offices (1 Sansome St). Simone shared finished seed round pitch deck on May 15 — review ahead of meeting.

items.title: Prepare for SMBC AD management meeting about Atlas Beyond Fund
items.context: Calendar event 'SMBC AD management meeting about SMBC Fin Atlas Beyond Fund' on May 27 with 24 attendees from SMBC, JRI America, Atlas Beyond, and Fin Capital. Ryo Ishii recently requested alignment on key topics for the meeting.

items.title: Prepare for Fin Capital Navigator Day and Webinar
items.context: Calendar events 'Fin Capital Navigator Day' (all day May 27) and 'Navigator Webinar' (May 27, 12:30-2pm PT) with full team and portfolio companies invited.

items.title: Upload YC batch data
items.context: Calendar reminder 'Upload YC' on May 27 at 9:15am PT — personal task block.

items.title: Prepare for Vanguard <> Fin Capital catch-up call
items.context: Calendar event 'Vanguard <> Fin Capital catch-up' on May 28 at 12:30pm ET with del_giannotti@vanguard.com via Zoom.
